title: fagelia ferruginea
intro: Fagelia ferruginea, also known as Red Fagelia, is a plant species belonging to the family Ericaceae. It is a shrub native to the Andes in South America, used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fagelia ferruginea include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Fagelia ferruginea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in some folk remedies for its antiseptic and antibacterial properties.
